titleStmt.title: SII 11.63: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 63. (B.K. No. 160 of 1926-27). ASUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE ĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Jagadēkamalla (I) and registers a gift of land at Kariyāḷa made by Mahāsāhaṇādhipati Sauchaya-Nāyaka who was administering Eleya-Pasuṇḍi in the Beḷvola Three Hundred district, to the temple of Bhōgēśvara, after washing the feet of Dēvasiṅgi-Paṇḍita, a pupil of Maleyāḷa-Paṇḍita of the temple of Nakarēśvara at Aṇṇigeṟe. The record is dated Śaka 948, Prabhava, Paushya, śu. 13, Sunday, Uttarāyṇa-saṅkrānti. Prabhava corresponded to Śaka 949 and in this year Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti fell on Paushya, ba. 9, Sunday, but in the previous year, i.e., Kshaya, the saṅkrānti fell on Paushya, śu. 13, which was a Saturday. The probable English equivalent of the date would be A.D. 1026, December 24.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahā
rājādhirājaṁ paramēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśra
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmat jagadēkama
lladēvara vijairājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamāna
mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svastyanēkagu
ṇagaṇālaṁkrita satyaśaucaucāra cāritranayavinayaśīḷasaṁpa
nnaṁ sujanaprasanna satyayudhiṣṭira śaucagāṁgēyanāmādisama
staprasastisahita śrīmanmahāsāhaṇādhipati saucaya nāya
kar beḷvola mūnūṟa ṟoḷagaṇa bhattagāve Eleya pasuṇḍi
yaṁ duṣṭanigrahaviṣiṣṭapratipāḷanadināḷdu sukhadinire sa
kavarṣa 948 neya prabhava saṁvatsarada pauśya suddha trayōdasi
yādivāraṁ Uttarāyaṇa śaṁkrāṁtinimittaṁ Aṁṇnegeṟeya nakarē
svarada maleyāḷapaṇḍitara śiṣyaṁ yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyāna
dhāraṇamōnānuṣṭāṇaparāyaṇarappa dēvasiṁgi paṇḍitara pādaprakṣa
ḷanadhārāpūrvvakaṁ paṁdigoḷada baṭṭeyiṁ mūḍa kariyāḷadalli śrī bhōgēsvara
dēvargge Aṅgabhōgake yirppatteṁṭugēṇa gaḷeyoḷaṁ biṭṭa matta rāṟu
Allaya nayiṣṭika tapōdhanargge biṭṭa matta rāṟu Antu matta rppannera
ḍakkaṁ Aruvaṇa gadyāṇa 1 paṇa 3 ma nalli yoḷkeyarasu gāvuṇḍa
nuṁ pratipāḷisuva riṁtī dharmmamaṁ kādu naḍeyisidavargge vāriṇāsiyo
ḷaṁ kurukṣētradoḷaṁ sāsirabrāhmaṇargga mekkōṭi tapōdhanarggaṁ sāsirakavileya
nubha(ṁ)yamukhi goṭṭa phaḷamakkuṁ . Īṁtīdharmmama naḷida rpaṁcamahāpā
takarappar © bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ yasya ya
sya yadā bhūmi tasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō ha
rēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi miṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pāḷanīyō bha
vadbhiḥ sarvvānētāṁ bhāvinaḥ pārtthivēṁ drānbhūyō bhūyō yā
catē rāmabhadraḥ . maṅgaḷa mahā śrī ©
Digital edition of SII 11.63 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
